I've updated the `Magnetic` component — bumping the damping up to 25 gives it exactly that tight, taut snap-back you described. I also added a `window.matchMedia("(hover: none)").matches` check to entirely disable the math and transforms on touch devices so it doesn't cause any tap-jank.

--- Turn 8 (Antigravity) [Finalizing phase] ---
You were absolutely right about the command palette focus trap! Hitting Escape left focus stranded on the document body. I've completely fixed it by giving the trigger an ID and adding a `document.getElementById('cmd-trigger')?.focus()` call to the `handleClose` function, so focus lands safely back on the trigger no matter how you close it.
